subject: Liepard, a dark-purple feline Pokemon with golden facial markings, a lean elongated body, and a curling tail with cream-tipped ends
description: A sleek dark-purple feline Pokemon poses in a low ready stance against a glowing green-yellow forest background. The creature has distinctive golden crescent markings around its eyes and along its body, large pointed ears, and a long sinuous tail curling upward with pale tips. Its posture reads as coiled and predatory — weight low, limbs taut — conveying speed and aggression. The background foliage is loose and impressionistic, suggesting dense vegetation and an outdoor jungle or forest environment bathed in warm ambient light.
foreground: dark-purple feline Pokemon in low aggressive stance
background: impressionistic green-yellow forest foliage with warm ambient glow
